agents.name: Explorer Agent
agents.role: Surfaces the relevant gold models for the CRE NOI attribution question. Starts from the investment problem, not the file tree.
agents.sample_input: Find models related to NOI, pro-forma variance, WALT, rent roll, Class-A office, Sunbelt, and metro segmentation.
responsibilities: Runs status to confirm the dbt project is parsed and healthy
Runs search with CRE vocabulary against model names, columns, and descriptions
Hands candidate model list to Summary

agents.name: Summary Agent
agents.role: Documents the grain of each upstream, the join keys, and where the attribution gap sits. Decides before any SQL whether the data can answer the CIO's question.
agents.sample_input: For those models, show grain, key columns, and how they join. Where is the gap between what we have and what the Investment Committee needs?
responsibilities: Runs describe on each candidate model to confirm grain
Runs lineage to validate the join path
Names the new grain the gold table has to land on

agents.name: Worker Agent
agents.role: Authors the new gold.fct_noi_attribution_by_asset_class_metro_quarter with proper CTEs, joins, and WALT compression attribution.
agents.sample_input: Create gold.fct_noi_attribution_by_asset_class_metro_quarter as a table materialization. Validate grain with dbt_show before committing the file.
responsibilities: Runs warehouse and dbt_show on a targeted slice to validate proposed grain
Writes the SQL file with CTEs, joins, and final aggregation
Materializes the model to the gold schema on Iceberg

agents.name: Verification Agent
agents.role: Adds dbt tests, schema contract, and ownership. Validates against existing lineage and confirms downstream consumers can read the new asset.
agents.sample_input: Add tests covering uniqueness on (asset_class, metro_code, fiscal_quarter) and not-null on noi_variance_usd. Confirm lineage picks the new gold table up immediately.
responsibilities: Writes YAML companion with description, tests, and schema contract
Confirms uniqueness and not-null tests pass against materialized slice
Updates lineage so downstream consumers pick the asset up immediately
